description_long: This is a cylindrical red can with the iconic Coca-Cola branding prominently displayed in white script across the front. The can features a glossy metallic surface with realistic water droplets, giving it a cold, refreshing appearance. Swirling white and yellow lines accentuate the background, adding dynamic visual interest. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. On the reverse side, there is a detailed nutritional information panel, barcode, and recycling symbols, all printed in white against the red background. The overall design is vibrant and instantly recognizable as a classic soft drink container.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white script branding, water droplets, and detailed nutritional labeling on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola logo, swirling lines, and water droplets.
description_view_1: Side-rear view displaying the nutritional information panel, barcode, and partial logo.
description_view_2: Rear-side view with a clear view of the barcode, nutritional facts, and partial logo.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the swirling design and water droplets, with the logo partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The Coca-Cola logo is prominently displayed in large, white cursive script on the front of the can, spanning vertically and horizontally, with a swirling white and yellow background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The red color and Coca-Cola branding indicate the classic cola flavor; no additional flavor text or graphics are visible.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutritional information panel is visible on the back of the can, including a barcode and recycling symbols.
